case_title: STEVEN ADAIR MACDONALD VS. JOHN DUPEN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED NOV-24-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MACDONALD, STEVEN ADAIR
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFF REGARDING FEE ARBITRATION BEFORE THE SF BAR ASSOCIATION AND REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2009 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,138.40 FILED BY MACDONALD, STEVEN ADAIR AS TO DEFENDANT DUPEN, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DUPEN, JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MACDONALD, STEVEN ADAIR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
